_comment: EXAMPLE ONLY. You normally never edit this — enter everything inside the app (Login + Settings screens). The real file is created automatically at ~/.config/frogs_yt_replier/config.json (Windows: %APPDATA%\..\.config or your XDG dir) with 0600 permissions. This shows the shape and where each value goes. DO NOT put real keys here or commit a filled-in copy.
system_prompt: You are the friendly voice of <YOUR BRAND>. Reply to the YouTube comment warmly in one or two short sentences. Never sound like an ad or a bot. Use at most one emoji. Only include a link if the comment explicitly asks where to buy.
